{{Infobox icon
| name = Oracle Icon
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] was once considered a prime candidate to manifest the [[Oracle Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has the guidance of the [[Oracle Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Icon]] can allow one to steal from a sealed [[void]] space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Icon]] is shaped like an all-seeing eye.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
